meta.title: Meridian Estates — Prime addresses across the Emirates
meta.description: Discover prime residential property across Dubai and Abu Dhabi. Search by need with our AI matcher, estimate mortgages, and explore ready and off-plan homes.

matcher.label: Find your match
matcher.hint: Describe what you're looking for — our matcher does the rest.
matcher.placeholder: e.g. 3 bed villa near good schools, around 4.5 million

matcher.fallbackNote: Showing best-guess matches — our AI matcher is momentarily unavailable.

calculator.title: Mortgage & ROI Calculator
calculator.intro: Estimate a monthly mortgage payment and gross rental yield. Adjust the sliders — figures update live.
calculator.prefilledNote: Pre-filled with the price of the property you were viewing.
calculator.disclaimer: All figures are estimates for guidance only and are not live bank rates, offers, or financial advice. The DLD 4% transfer fee reflects a public Dubai Land Department regulation. Confirm all figures with a licensed advisor.

mortgage.title: Mortgage estimate
mortgage.subtitle: Estimated monthly repayment for a UAE residential mortgage.

roi.title: Rental yield estimate
roi.subtitle: Gross rental yield based on price and expected annual rent.

about.title: Prime UAE property, guided by expertise
about.body1: Meridian Estates is a residential property consultancy for Dubai and Abu Dhabi. We help buyers, renters, and investors navigate the UAE market with dense, structured search, an AI matcher that understands what you're really after, detailed property pages, and interactive financial tools — all in one place.
about.body2: Everything about the experience is built to be precise, fast, accessible, and fully bilingual. From ready homes to off-plan opportunities, our advisors pair local market knowledge with technology so you can move with confidence.
about.agentsSubtitle: Our advisory team, each reachable on a direct WhatsApp line.
about.disclosureBody: We combine deep local knowledge of Dubai and Abu Dhabi with intelligent search and transparent financial tooling — so every enquiry is met with clear specs, honest guidance, and a direct line to an advisor.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: Send a message and an advisor will be in touch, or reach us directly.
contact.name: Full name
contact.successBody: We've received your message and an advisor will be in touch shortly. For a faster reply, feel free to message us on WhatsApp.

errors.name: Please enter your name.
